title: rhodiola euryphylla
intro: Rhodiola euryphylla, also known as Golden Root, is a perennial plant in the Rhodiola genus that thrives in cold, mountainous regions of the world. This plant is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which enable it to promote balance and resilience in the body, particularly in response to stress. The medicinal properties of Rhodiola euryphylla include its ability to enhance mental clarity, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of depression and anxiety. Rhodiola euryphylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, making it a versatile herbal remedy for supporting overall well-being.
